header.title: Learning Hub
header.description: A comprehensive collection of articles, tutorials, and case studies designed for all skill levels - from developers just starting out to CTOs making technology decisions.

contentTypes.title: Articles & Insights
contentTypes.description: In-depth technical articles covering architecture, security, testing, DevOps, and business strategy.

contentTypes.title: Tutorials
contentTypes.description: Step-by-step guides with hands-on exercises covering Next.js, Strapi, testing, and integrations.

contentTypes.title: Case Studies
contentTypes.description: Real-world examples with before/after comparisons, metrics, and actionable takeaways.

audienceSections.title: Just Getting Started?
audienceSections.description: Begin with foundational tutorials and beginner-level articles. Suggested path: Getting Started → Fundamentals → First Project.

audienceSections.title: Building Solutions
audienceSections.description: Deepen your skills with intermediate articles, advanced tutorials, and real-world case studies. Suggested path: Architecture → Advanced Patterns → Case Studies.

audienceSections.title: Making Decisions
audienceSections.description: Stay at the edge of best practices with advanced content, business strategy insights, and scalability case studies. Suggested path: Architecture Decisions → Performance → CTO Strategy.
